sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72731" key="oi)wnopole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰωνο-πολέω</orth>, <sense id="n72731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">practise augury,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:2p.50H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2p.50H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
